runTitle: Vercel preview targeted QA - reporter/dashboard follow-up branch verification
coveredSurfaces: preview landing route via Vercel protection bypass
preview login redirect behavior for protected dashboard route
skippedSurfaces: dashboard modal auto-focus verification on preview

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after preview verification; effective 12.3711 USD, billed 0 USD, no unexpected billed usage surfaced.

notes: Vercel preview returned HTTP 200 on / with x-vercel-protection-bypass header applied.
Navigating to /dashboard?serverId=web-nginx-dc1-01 returned HTTP 200 but redirected to /login?redirectTo=%2Fdashboard, so dashboard/modal assertions could not run.
Preview login page did not expose a guest-mode CTA, which blocked remote verification of the serverId modal auto-focus flow.

Deployment metadata reported gitCommitRef=main and gitCommitSha=ac18ca2f99e4ade8fcad2e0646e6d20cffd23de3, while the local branch under test was feat/reporter-dashboard-followups at 75ed79dffa785fcfd18567aa715644da650c9045.
